base_url.description: BreezoMeter API base URL override for tests or proxies.

api_key.description: BreezoMeter API key, sent as the `key` query parameter; never logged.

latitude.description: Latitude of the location to read conditions/forecasts for.

longitude.description: Longitude of the location to read conditions/forecasts for.

hours_to_forecast.description: Optional `hours` query param for the air_quality_forecast stream (number of hourly forecast points to return).

historic_hours.description: Optional `hours` query param for the air_quality_history stream (number of hourly historical points to return).

days_to_forecast.description: Optional `days` query param for the pollen_forecast stream (number of daily forecast points to return).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
